prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `ae58858e`.
codex_response:
Implemented `task_ae58858e`. The rule is: recolor each orthogonally connected red component from `2` to `6` iff the component size is greater than `3`; smaller red components stay red. `arc2_opus46_summary.json` matched and was used, while `arc2_sonnet45_summary.jsonl` was discarded because it incorrectly describes the transformed shapes as rectangles; that mismatch is documented in [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_ae58858e/notes.md#L1).

The package wiring is in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_ae58858e/__init__.py#L1), the verifier is in [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_ae58858e/verifier.py#L4), and the generator is in [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_ae58858e/generator.py#L6). The generator matches the task family by building sparse black-background grids with disconnected red components, mixing compact `4..7`-cell clusters with `1..3`-cell noise fragments so only the larger components flip to `6`. No new primitive was added.

Validation passed:
- `conda run --no-capture-output -n arc python -m arc2.shared.verify --task ae58858e` -> `5/5` official examples passed
- `conda run --no-capture-output -n arc python -m arc2.shared.build --task ae58858e --n-examples 1000` -> built artifacts successfully
- `./arc2_verify_generated_all.sh --task ae58858e` -> `1000/1000` generated examples passed
